confidence_rationale: This is an instructional video, not a performance to be scored
technique_summary: Educational content covering systematic geometric approach to laparoscopic suturing with emphasis on proper needle driving, motion cues, and intracorporeal knot tying techniques.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper needle grasp at 2/3 point from tip
common_errors_addressed: Poor needle angle leading to tissue damage
Poor wrapping technique in knot formation
